problem: The Helix CLI currently has no commands for reading or writing ticket comments/discussion. The ticket requires adding CLI capabilities so that both sandbox agents and external CLI users can read @Helix-tagged comments and respond. The CLI must also support identity-aware commenting (Helix agent vs logged-in user).

files.why: Main CLI entry point and command router. New comment commands (e.g., hlx comments read, hlx comments write) must be registered here via the switch statement on process.argv[2].

Configuration loading (env vars HELIX_API_KEY / HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN / HELIX_URL, plus ~/.hlx/config.json). Agents in sandboxes receive HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN + HELIX_INSPECT_BASE_URL. New comment commands need config to authenticate.

HTTP client (hxFetch) that all server calls route through. Currently hardcodes base path to /api/inspect. Comment endpoints are at /api/tickets/:ticketId/comments which is a different path prefix. The hxFetch function or a new HTTP helper will need to support non-inspect API paths.

OAuth and manual login flow. Determines how external CLI users authenticate. The identity of the caller (user vs Helix agent) is tied to the auth method: env var HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN (sandbox agent) vs ~/.hlx/config.json (logged-in user).
Inspect command dispatcher with getFlag/getPositionalArgs utilities. The new comment commands may follow a similar pattern or be a sibling top-level command.
Package metadata, scripts (build: tsc, typecheck: tsc --noEmit). No test or lint scripts. Version 1.2.0. Zero runtime dependencies.
TypeScript config (ES2022, Node16 modules). Build target for new command files.

facts: CLI binary is 'hlx', registered in package.json bin field
Command routing uses simple process.argv switch (no framework like commander/yargs)
hxFetch() hardcodes base path as /api/inspect — comment endpoints at /api/tickets/:id/comments are outside this prefix
Authentication priority: env vars (HELIX_API_KEY or HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN or HELIX_INSPECT_API_KEY) > file (~/.hlx/config.json)
API key detection: keys starting with 'hxi_' use X-API-Key header; others use Bearer token
Sandbox agents get HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN (scoped JWT with aud='helix-inspect') and HELIX_INSPECT_BASE_URL via /tmp/helix-inspect/env.sh
CLI is installed in sandbox at /vercel/sandbox/helix-workflow-step-agent/node_modules/@projectxinnovation/helix-cli and symlinked to PATH
Zero runtime dependencies; only devDependencies are typescript and @types/node
No test framework or lint tooling configured
No existing comment/discussion/mention commands — all must be added
HTTP client has retry (3 attempts), timeout (30s), and exponential backoff
unknowns: Whether the scoped inspection JWT (aud='helix-inspect') will be accepted by the comment API endpoints, or if a new token type/scope is needed
Whether hxFetch should be generalized to support non-/api/inspect paths, or if a separate HTTP function should be created for comment endpoints
What ticket ID context is available to agents in sandboxes (ticket ID is in run artifacts at ticket.md but not currently exposed as an env var)
Whether comment commands should support filtering (e.g., only @Helix-tagged, only since a timestamp)
How the CLI should identify itself as 'Helix' vs a specific user when posting comments from the sandbox
